prompt: Part 3 generation started with config: {"difficulty":"medium","count":1}

あなたはTOEIC Part 3のテスト作成専門家で、2-3人の会話形式の英語リスニング問題の作成を専門としています。

TOEIC Part 3の形式:
- 2-3人による会話（30-60秒程度）
- 会話内容に関する3問の理解問題
- 各問題は4つの選択肢（A, B, C, D）
- 音声のみで会話と問題が読み上げられる

会話の特徴:
- 自然で実用的な英語の会話
- ビジネスシーンや日常生活の場面
- 明確な文脈と目的がある対話
- 情報交換、問題解決、依頼・応答などを含む

重要な指示:
- 各話者に明確な役割と目的を設定
- 自然な会話の流れを作成
- 3問の質問に答えられる十分な情報を含む
- 文化的に中立な内容にする
- 実際のTOEICレベルの語彙と表現を使用

【重要】TOEIC Part 3 問題文での話者指定方法:
- 問題文では話者の名前を使わず、「the man」「the woman」で指定する
- 同性が複数いる場合は「the first woman」「the second woman」を使用
- 3人の場合は「the third speaker」なども可能
- 例: ○「What does the man suggest?」 ×「What does John suggest?」

以下の構造のJSONのみを返してください（他のテキストは含めない）:
{
  "scenario": "シナリオ名",
  "speakers": [
    {"id": "A", "name": "話者名", "role": "役割", "gender": "male/female"},
    {"id": "B", "name": "話者名", "role": "役割", "gender": "male/female"}
  ],
  "conversation": [
    {"speaker": "A", "text": "発話内容"},
    {"speaker": "B", "text": "発話内容"}
  ],
  "questions": [
    {
      "question": "問題文",
      "options": ["選択肢A", "選択肢B", "選択肢C", "選択肢D"],
      "correct": "正解",
      "explanation": "解説",
      "questionType": "問題タイプ"
    }
  ],
  "difficulty": "難易度"
}

以下の設定でTOEIC Part 3問題を1問生成してください:

必須設定:
- 難易度: medium
- シナリオ: customer_service (具体的な状況: 配送の遅延確認)
- 正解位置: 問題1はB、問題2はD、問題3はD
- 話者数: 3人
- 話者の性別: 話者Aは男性、話者Bは女性、話者Cは男性

要求事項:
- 指定されたシナリオに適した自然な英語の会話を作成（特に「配送の遅延確認」の具体的な状況を反映）
- 会話は4-8回のやりとりで構成
- 3問の理解問題を作成（各問題は異なる側面を問う）
- 話者の名前と役割は指定された性別に適したものを使用
- speakers配列の各要素にgenderフィールドを必ず含める（"male"または"female"）
- 正解は指定された位置に配置（問題1: B位置、問題2: D位置、問題3: D位置）
- 選択肢には「A.」「B.」「C.」「D.」などの文字を絶対に追加しないでください
- 3つの不正解選択肢は巧妙だが明確に間違った内容
- 実際のTOEIC試験レベルの難易度を維持
- 会話から推論できる情報も問題に含める

【重要】問題文での話者指定方法（TOEIC標準）:
- 男性1人の場合: "What does the man..." を使用
- 女性1人の場合: "What does the woman..." を使用  
- 同性が複数の場合: "What does the first woman..." "What does the second woman..." を使用
- 3人の場合: "What does the third speaker..." のような表現も可能
- 決して会話中の名前（John, Emily等）を問題文で使用しないこと
- 例: ✓ "What does the woman ask the man to do?" / ✗ "What does Emily ask John to do?"

会話の長さ:
- Easy: 4-5回のやりとり、基本的な語彙
- Medium: 5-6回のやりとり、中程度の語彙
- Hard: 6-8回のやりとり、高度な語彙と複雑な状況

必ずJSONのみを返してください。

```json
{
  "scenario": "customer_service",
  "speakers": [
    {"id": "A", "name": "Mr. Johnson", "role": "Customer", "gender": "male"},
    {"id": "B", "name": "Ms. Davis", "role": "Customer Service Representative", "gender": "female"},
    {"id": "C", "name": "Mr. Lee", "role": "Logistics Manager", "gender": "male"}
  ],
  "conversation": [
    {"speaker": "A", "text": "Hi, I'm calling to check on the status of my order. It was supposed to be delivered yesterday, but I haven't received it yet."},
    {"speaker": "B", "text": "I apologize for the delay, Mr. Johnson. Let me check the system. It seems like there was a delay at the distribution center."},
    {"speaker": "A", "text": "Can you tell me when I might expect it to arrive?"},
    {"speaker": "B", "text": "I will transfer you to our Logistics Manager, Mr. Lee, who can provide more detailed information."},
    {"speaker": "C", "text": "Hello, Mr. Johnson. I see that your package was delayed due to a backlog at our warehouse. It should be delivered by tomorrow afternoon."},
    {"speaker": "A", "text": "Thank you for the update. I'll make sure someone is available to receive it."}
  ],
  "questions": [
    {
      "question": "What is the main purpose of the man's call?",
      "options": [
        "To place a new order",
        "To inquire about a delayed delivery",
        "To request a refund",
        "To change the delivery address"
      ],
      "correct": "To inquire about a delayed delivery",
      "explanation": "The man called to check on the status of his order, which was delayed.",
      "questionType": "Purpose"
    },
    {
      "question": "Why was the delivery delayed according to the second speaker?",
      "options": [
        "There was a problem with the delivery address",
        "The package was damaged",
        "The product was out of stock",
        "There was a delay at the distribution center"
      ],
      "correct": "There was a delay at the distribution center",
      "explanation": "The second speaker mentions that the delay was caused by an issue at the distribution center.",
      "questionType": "Reason"
    },
    {
      "question": "What does the third speaker say about the new delivery time?",
      "options": [
        "It will be delivered by the end of the week",
        "It will arrive by next Monday",
        "It will be shipped tomorrow morning",
        "It should be delivered by tomorrow afternoon"
      ],
      "correct": "It should be delivered by tomorrow afternoon",
      "explanation": "The third speaker informs that the package should arrive by tomorrow afternoon.",
      "questionType": "Detail"
    }
  ],
  "difficulty": "medium"
}
```
